title: Explicit context caching
summary: Pre-cache a large prefix and reference it by name on subsequent calls. Cached prompt tokens bill at roughly 25% of the input rate.
notes: Caches have a minimum prefix size — typically 2,048 tokens on Flash and 4,096 on Pro. Below that the API rejects creation; the sample inlines a long-enough body.
ttl defaults to one hour; bill it for the duration you keep it alive even if unused.
For shorter, opportunistic reuse, implicit caching kicks in automatically when a prefix repeats — see cached_content_token_count without ever calling caches.create.
